_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: CT for MM / Amyloidosis (VD - Bortezomib, Dexamethasone)
min_doctor_qualification: MD Medicine with experience/ Fellowship in Hematology/Medical Oncology
clinical_indications: Standard Risk; Transplant ineligible and not fit for triplet

clinical_thresholds.note: Bortezomib based regimen should not be used.

preauth.label: Clinical notes (ECOG-Performance status, comorbidities, prior treatment, response, neuropathy, infections, diagnosis, stage, risk stratification)
Investigations: CBC, LFT, RFT, Ca, Viral markers, calculated creatinine clearance
Investigations: Beta2 microglobulin, SPEP+IFE, S.FLC assay, Urine Bence Jones Protein (BJP)
Investigations: Skeletal survey, MRI (for cord compression), PET-CT (for solitary plasmacytoma)
Investigations: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy
Investigations: Trop-T, NT-Pro BNP, 24-hour urine protein, 2D-ECHO (if amyloidosis)

claim.label: All documents (clinical notes, investigations, treatment protocol) as asked during pre-auth
Response assessment details after every 3/4th cycle (clinical notes, supporting SPEP/FLC assay)
Amyloidosis response assessment (Trop-T, NT-Pro BNP, FLC assay, 24 hour urine protein if abnormal at diagnosis)
Follow-up care advised (OPD visits, CBC, RFT, LFT, Ca, SPEP+IFE, FLC assay, imaging)

ppd_preauth.q: Bortezomib based regimen to be used with existing neuropathy (grade >2)?

cpd_claim.q: Same regimen used in last 6 months without documentation of partial response or absence of disease progression?
No response evaluation performed in the last 6 months for repeated packages?
Same regimen continued despite documented progressive disease?

common_queries: Bortezomib based regimen chosen for a patient with neuropathy (grade >2).
Same regimen used in the last 6 months without documentation of partial response or absence of disease progression.
No response evaluation performed in the last 6 months for repeated packages.
Same regimen continued despite documented progressive disease.
Mandatory documents for pre-authorization/claim are incomplete or missing.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Essential Medical Personnel: Qualified Medical Oncologist/ Hematologist; Essential Medical Infrastructure: Chemotherapy unit/Day care/ Injection room
clinical_key_pointers: All packages can be repeated provided there is documentation of partial response with regimen and patient had remained without disease progression after that regimen for more than 6 months with no contraindications.
additional_information.post_op_care: Supportive care: Pain management, Acyclovir, PCP prophylaxis, oral hygiene, nutritional supplements.
additional_information.comorbidity_management: Comorbidities (diabetes, cardiac dysfunction, prior history of thromboembolism) should be documented in clinical notes; ECHO may be needed if cardiac comorbidities.
additional_information.referral_criteria: Guidance & clinical decision support tool for deciding referral of cases to the appropriate level of care (as required).
